sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 53

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 53:1
items.html: (to the question) For all the correction of the Nukva, and all the connection she has with ZA [Zeir Anpin] whereby he can correct her, is because of the cleaving of her GE [Galgalta ve Eynaim] to the AHP [Awzen, Hotem, Peh] of ZA; for this reason she rises together with him as MAN [Mayin Nukvin] to AVI [Aba ve Ima], and for this reason she afterwards descends with him to his place and he corrects her, as is known. Therefore the Nukva has no hold except in the place of the new AHP, in which is all her cleaving to ZA — both at the time of their fall into BYA [Beria, Yetzira, Assiya] and at the time of the return to Atzilut, when they joined and became the discernment of the new NHY [Netzah, Hod, Yesod] of ZA, as is known. But with the discernments of the GE of ZA's Katnut, which are the former HGT-NHY of ZA, the Nukva has no connection at all; they are entirely above her degree — and how could she cleave to them? And it is known that the new NHY begin from the Chazeh [chest] downward of ZA at the time of Gadlut, being the discernment of the fallen AHP, in which there is the discernment of ZON of Bina and the collective ZON, as is known. Therefore the discernments of the ZAT of Bina in them take the two lower thirds of the Tiferet of ZA, for Tiferet is the discernment of Bina of Hassadim; and Hotem-Peh, which are the collective ZON, become the discernment of the new NHY. Thus the place of the restored AHP of ZA is from the Chazeh downward; hence the cleaving of the Nukva to ZA is likewise discerned from the place of the Chazeh downward, because they were with her in one degree at the time of the fall — unlike above the Chazeh, where the old VAK [six ends] of ZA stand, with which she never had any connection or equivalence. And it is known that no Partzuf can rise above its own degree even by a hair's breadth. (p. 774, Item 64)
